title: centella villosa var. villosa
intro: Centella villosa var. villosa, commonly known as Indian pennywort or Asiatic pennywort, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Centella villosa var. villosa include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting skin health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Centella villosa var. villosa can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments.
